name: Fiix CMMS API
description: Fiix (by Rockwell Automation) is a cloud-based Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS). The REST API provides CRUD operations on all Fiix objects including assets, work orders, parts, purchase orders, locations, and users. Uses a single endpoint with operation-based JSON requests.
